name: GABLE
description: GABLE is the community token of Gable Guardians, a blockchain-enabled MMORPG built on the Solana network. The token is designed to support specific in-game economic mechanisms rather than serving as a speculative or reward-based asset. Gable Guardians combines traditional RPG gameplay (quests, crafting, dungeons, character progression) with on-chain ownership of digital assets. GABLE is integrated into selected in-game systems, including battle pass purchases and a native in-game swap module. The project focuses on building a sustainable game economy where blockchain technology enhances asset ownership and transparency without disrupting gameplay balance.
